title: Employer
description: A single employer profile. Singleton record stored with rkey 'self'.

name.description: Display name of the employer or organization

shortDescription.description: One or two sentence overview of the employer

longDescription.description: Extended description of the employer. Markdown supported.

jobTraits.description: Traits describing the nature of jobs at this employer

employeeTraits.description: Traits describing the kind of employees who thrive here

image.description: URL to employer logo or image

name.description: Trait name, used as both the identifier and display label
